opinion.h: FRIEDMAN v. NEW YORK APPEAL FROM THE COURT OF APPEALS OF NEW YORK No. 1137. Decided March 23, 1970
opinion.p: Marx Leva, Alexander B. Hawes, and Richard E. Nolan for appellant.
Louis J. Lefkowitz, Attorney General of New York, Ruth Kessler Toch, Solicitor General, and Jeremiah Jochnowitz, Assistant Attorney General, for appellee.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
